name: The Meridian Tech-Knit Hoodie
description: Unstructured silhouette in 100% European linen. Natural, breathable, effortless.

name: The Velvet-Wool Tailored Trouser
description: Tailored in a classic straight cut, these trousers are made from a luxurious velvet-wool blend. The fabric is soft and drapey, offering a comfortable fit that flatters the silhouette.

name: The Riviera Azure Chino Short
description: A classic chino short in a soft azure blue. Tailored for a flattering fit.

name: The Alabaster Sovereign Waistcoat
description: A refined waistcoat in a crisp alabaster white. Crafted from breathable cotton for all-day comfort.

name: The Heritage Monogram Pullover
description: Extra-fine merino in a relaxed shirt cut. Wears as a layer or alone.

name: The Aria Tessellated V-Neck
description: Washed silk crepe. Adjustable wrap. Designed to move with you.

name: The Élégance Grand Satchel
description: Full-grain leather. Ages into a patina unique to the wearer.

name: The Sovereign Monogram Tee
description: Heavyweight cotton. Garment-dyed. Builds character with every wash.

name: The Atelier Wide-Leg Trouser
description: Tailored wide-leg in Italian wool blend. Fluid, structured, timeless.

name: The Côte Relaxed Chino
description: Stone-washed cotton canvas. Relaxed tapered fit. Built for all-day wear.

name: The Riviera Silk Scarf
description: 100% silk twill. Hand-rolled edges. Printed in Lyon, France.

name: The Maison Oversized Coat
description: Double-faced cashmere wool. Minimalist silhouette. Built to last decades.

name: The Canvasse Field Jacket
description: Waxed Japanese cotton canvas. Four patch pockets. Ages beautifully.

name: The Blanc Linen Shirt
description: Relaxed fit in enzyme-washed linen. Worn tucked or untucked.

name: The Brume Merino Crewneck
description: Extra-fine merino. Ribbed cuffs and hem. A wardrobe foundation.

name: The Tanner Leather Belt
description: Vegetable-tanned full-grain leather. Brass buckle. Patinas over time.

name: The Édition Wool Blazer
description: Single-breasted in Italian wool. Unlined for drape. Ageless.

name: The Minuit Clutch
description: Smooth calfskin with a magnetic closure. Evening to everyday.

name: The Lumière Silk Blouse
description: Fluid silk charmeuse. Relaxed collar. Effortlessly elegant.

name: The Sable Drawstring Trouser
description: Cupro-blend in a relaxed straight cut. Breathable, falls beautifully.

name: The Nuage Trench Coat
description: Classic trench silhouette in water-resistant cotton gabardine.

name: The Éclat Sunglasses
description: Acetate frames. Mineral glass lenses. Handmade in Italy.

name: The Bordeaux Muse Satchel
description: Hand-stitched in Italy. Smooth calfskin with a magnetic closure.

name: The Elegance Signature Monogram Belt
description: The Élégance Signature Monogram Belt This luxurious women's belt features our iconic 'Maison d'Élégance' monogram precisely debossed into the deep burgundy pebble-grain leather, exactly matching the Muse Satchel. A contrasting gold-tone rectangular buckle provides a sophisticated, minimalist clasp, finished with clean edges and exquisite stitching. This accessory effortlessly elevates any silhouette, whether defining a tailored blazer or pairing with premium denim.
